# Repository-wide Copilot instructions

## General
- Treat `docs/product.md` as the primary scope document.
- Prefer the smallest safe change that fully solves the assigned task.
- Preserve existing structure unless a task explicitly requires a structural change.

## Stack
- Use TypeScript where code is written.
- Keep the design simple and maintainable.
- Do not introduce major dependencies unless clearly needed.

## Quality
- Write clear, production-style code.
- Avoid placeholder code and unnecessary abstraction.
- Add validation where inputs are involved.

## Pull requests
- Keep changes focused.
- Summarize what changed and why.
- Flag assumptions clearly.
